title: Do Google engineers actually vibe code?
summary: Alberta Tech explores whether Google engineers engage in "vibing code," a colloquial term for rapid or intuitive coding. The video compares code generation approaches from OpenAI Codex and Claude, then examines Google's vibing culture across 2024, 2025, and 2026 projections, including discussion of "Google Tech Island."
